news.headline: Ignacio Moyano Córdoba named VP of Business Development for LATAM at DunhamTrimmer, leader in biostimulants. Over 20 years experience in ag sector.
news.summary: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida, DunhamTrimmer, a key player in business intelligence for biocontrol, biostimulant, biofertilizer, and specialized nutrition sectors, has welcomed Ignacio Moyano Córdoba as their new Vice President of Business Development for Latin America. Ignacio brings over 20 years of expertise in agriculture, having served as General Manager of Stoller Brazil, Stoller Argentina, and various other LATAM branches. This strategic addition is set to bolster the company's presence in the region and drive further growth.

news.headline: European Recreational Cannabis Research Report 2024: Analyze evolving laws, target markets in Germany, Malta, Netherlands, Switzerland, Spain - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released a report titled "Exploring European Recreational Cannabis: Models and Commercial Opportunities." The report delves into the various models of recreational cannabis regulation currently in place across Europe, analyzing their intricacies and potential commercial prospects. In response to a growing trend, numerous European nations have been advocating for the legalization of non-medical cannabis in recent times. However, some countries have curtailed their efforts due to uncertainties surrounding the compatibility of such measures.

news.headline: Bitcoin futures premium at 8-month high, trading with a 20% annualized premium. Will BTC rally persist?
news.summary: Bitcoin futures are currently trading at a 20% annualized premium, a level not seen since March. This premium indicates strong bullish sentiment toward BTC and suggests potential for further price increases. The question remains whether the current rally in Bitcoin will continue amid this heightened optimism.

news.headline: Marine Corps Heritage Foundation to celebrate 250th anniversary of USMC with nationwide events, including coin striking.
news.summary: Throughout the year, a country-wide celebration is planned which will feature ceremonies at various local and national sporting events, as well as spotlighting local Marines. Additionally, there will be 50-state cake-cutting events, a traveling art exhibit, and participation in the Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show. This celebration is set to take place in 2024 and will include a range of events across the nation.

news.headline: France’s President Macron: Early next year, the new government will draft a new budget bill.
Stablecoins are transforming global finance by expanding the reach of the U.S. Dollar, benefiting underserved regions. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The prominence of stablecoins is on the rise as they play a crucial role in expanding the global influence of the U.S. dollar, while simultaneously tackling issues related to financial inclusion and national security. At the Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event, experts delved into the impact of these digital assets, which are pegged to traditional currencies, on the transformation of the worldwide financial landscape and the creation of new economic prospects.Stablecoins are actively reshaping the accessibility and utilization of the U.S. dollar on a global scale. Real Vision's CEO, Raoul Pal, emphasized the significance of stablecoins by stating that they are "dollarizing the world," penetrating even the most remote areas, from the rice fields in the Philippines to the Amazon rainforest. The growing demand for stablecoins, notably in underserved areas, is instrumental in bringing U.S. dollars to communities that previously lacked access to them.Perianne Boring, the founder and CEO of the Digital Chamber, underscored the geopolitical implications of this trend, emphasizing the critical role stablecoins play in extending the reach of the U.S. dollar. This shift towards stablecoins not only fosters financial inclusion but also bolsters national security efforts.

news.headline: France’s President Macron: I will carry out my full mandate as president.
France’s President Macron: I will name a new PM within the coming days.
Jetaire Group plans 2025 event schedule to promote INVICTA technology as alternative to nitrogen systems.
news.summary: Jetaire is actively promoting INVICTA as a superior alternative to nitrogen-generating systems by engaging directly with airlines and lessors. The manufacturer, Jetaire Group, is based in FAYETTEVILLE, Ga., and is emphasizing the benefits of INVICTA. This initiative was highlighted on Dec. 5, 2024, via a press release. Jetaire aims to educate the industry on INVICTA's advantages through direct interactions, as it seeks to position INVICTA as a leading choice in its market segment.

news.headline: Casey L. Heer recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence, Leader in Water Marine Insurance.
news.summary: In Grandby, Colorado on December 5, 2024, Casey L. Heer was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his outstanding work in Water Marine Insurance. He serves as the President of Casey Insurance Group.

news.headline: Curt R. Bigelow recognized in The Inner Circle as a Top Pinnacle Professional in Business Development on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: In the town of Frederick, Colorado on December 5, 2024, a press release highlighted the recognition of Curt R. Bigelow as a Top Pinnacle Professional in the field of Business Development in The Inner Circle. Mr. Bigelow's career achievements showcase his dedication and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: William S. Chesnutt recognized as Inner Circle Lifetime in MENIFE, Calif for transforming SMBs with quality consulting.
news.summary: In Menife, California on December 5, 2024, a notable figure, William S. Chesnutt, CEO, has been recognized as an Inner Circle Lifetime for his achievements in revolutionizing small and medium businesses through top-tier, cost-effective consulting and training services. This acknowledgment is part of The Inner Circle's spotlight on individuals making a significant impact in this sector.

news.headline: Shane T. Meeker recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Healthcare Marketing.
news.summary: A healthcare marketing professional, Shane T. Meeker, from Howell, N.J., was recognized on Dec. 5, 2024, as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle. Meeker's significant contributions to Healthcare Marketing earned him this distinction.

news.headline: Beer Institute estimates 11.4 million barrels of domestic tax paid shipments in October 2024, up 1.2% from 2023.
news.summary: In Washington on Dec. 05, 2024, the Beer Institute reported an approximate 11.4 million barrels of domestic tax paid shipments by beer brewers in October 2024. This marks a 1.2% increase from the roughly 11.3 million barrels recorded in October 2023. The estimated figures for January 2024 showed a 2.7% increase in shipments compared to January 2023, with a volume change of around 300,554 31-gallon barrels. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Teresa K. Braden, DO acknowledged as Pinnacle Professional Member for contributions to Internal and Emergency Medicine.
news.summary: A prominent figure in The Inner Circle, Dr. Teresa K. Braden, DO from Pueblo, Colo., has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member for her significant contributions to Internal and Emergency Medicine. Dr. Braden is a distinguished physician specializing in these fields, with expertise and experience in her practice. This acknowledgment showcases her accomplishments and expertise in the medical community. The recognition emphasizes her role as a key figure in the field, highlighting her skills and dedication to Internal and Emergency Medicine.

news.headline: Prominent essayist Lance Morrow, aged 85, known for his work at Time Magazine, passes away. Notable for "Man of the Year" covers and memoirs on heart attacks.
news.summary: The individual made a significant impact on the influential back page and was known for writing numerous cover articles featuring the "Man of the Year." He also chronicled his experiences with multiple heart attacks in his memoir.

news.headline: Portland opens first Psilocybin Service Center - PNW Integrative Center offers psilocybin experiences and mindfulness classes since Aug 2024.
news.summary: In August 2024, the PNW Integrative Center was established in Portland, Oregon. The center provides mindfulness classes and psilocybin experiences on a regular basis. On December 5, 2024, PNW Integrative Center, Inc. (PNWIC) officially launched its licensed psilocybin services and wellness programs, marking a significant milestone in the field.

news.headline: 4 ex-student-athletes sue SBUSD, alleging enabling of abuse by HS football coach. Lawsuits continue to rise.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, on December 5, 2024, the number of lawsuits against the district, as well as a former coach and security guard, continues to rise. Four ex-student-athletes have recently taken legal action by filing a civil complaint against the Santa Barbara Unified School District (SBUSD). The complaint accuses the district of misconduct, with the total number of complaints filed reaching a significant figure.

news.headline: James Kennedy partners with Rehab Monster, joining Monster Energy Family in exciting collaboration. announced on Instagram.
news.summary: Renowned DJ James Kennedy has recently partnered with energy drink brand Rehab Monster, officially joining the Monster Energy Family. The exciting collaboration was disclosed on Instagram, with Kennedy expressing his enthusiasm for the new venture. This announcement was made on December 5, 2024, from Corona, California. The joint effort aims to bring high energy to the party scene, with both parties thrilled about this new partnership.

news.headline: MicroStrategy is considering selling its volatility and buying more Bitcoin, according to anonymous sources.
CME plans to introduce 1 oz gold futures to cater to rising demand from retail traders, reports say.
news.summary: A massive fire broke out in a residential building, situated in the downtown area, leaving 50 families homeless. The fire started on the fourth floor and quickly spread, causing extensive damage to the entire building. Fortunately, all residents were evacuated safely, with six individuals sustaining minor injuries. The fire department deployed 10 fire trucks and 40 firefighters to contain the blaze, which was finally brought under control after six hours of continuous effort. Investigations are ongoing to determine the cause of the fire, with initial reports suggesting it may have been due to an electrical fault. The affected families are currently being housed in a nearby community center, with local authorities providing them with essential supplies and support during this difficult time.

news.headline: General Motors faces challenges in China with declining sales and market share.
France’s President Macron: The call for a snap election this summer is a decision that political actors haven't understood.
Jack Henry (JKHY) named 82nd in Forbes' Most Trusted Companies list for U.S. public companies with over 1,000 employees.
news.summary: In Monett, Missouri on December 5, 2024, Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) celebrated its recognition in Forbes' 2025 Most Trusted Companies in America roster. The company secured the 82nd spot among U.S. public entities boasting over 1,000 staff members. This achievement was attained through collaborative efforts with research firms Glassdoor, HundredX, and Signal.

news.headline: MGM Resorts promotes Ari Kastrati to Chief Content, Hospitality and Development Officer, overseeing new responsibilities.
news.summary: A major hospitality company, MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM), headquartered in Las Vegas, made a significant announcement on December 5, 2024. Ari Kastrati has been promoted to Chief Content, Hospitality, and Development Officer, a position he assumed with immediate effect. In this new role, Kastrati will be responsible for leading and managing the company's initiatives in these critical areas. This development underscores the company's commitment to enhancing its content, hospitality services, and development strategies.

news.headline: Trakt partners with Younify to launch Streaming Scrobbler, auto-populating Watch History and Ratings from Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, and Apple TV+.
news.summary: Trakt, a popular streaming tracking app, has introduced a new feature that automatically imports Watch History and Ratings from major platforms such as Netflix, Hulu, Prime Video, and Apple TV+. This development was announced on December 5, 2024, in Seattle. Trakt is known for enabling users to explore, monitor, and discuss their viewing preferences, and this update enhances user experience by streamlining data collection across different services.

news.headline: Can popup cities boost Ethereum innovation numbers? Drive ecosystem growth and foster sustainable blockchain projects.
news.summary: Innovation centers play a vital role in fostering the growth of Ethereum's ecosystem, facilitating community-driven progress, and tackling the obstacles related to shifting towards sustainable blockchain ventures. These hubs have proven instrumental in driving forward the development and adoption of Ethereum, with an increasing number of projects and developers gravitating towards them for support, guidance, and collaboration. By providing a platform for individuals to come together, share ideas, and work collectively, these innovation hubs are instrumental in nurturing the growth and success of Ethereum, demonstrating the power of community-driven initiatives.

news.headline: Comet partners with Amazon SageMaker, offering AI developers access to its platform for model evaluation.
news.summary: In New York, today, Comet, an AI development leader, revealed a key partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to introduce its platform to Amazon SageMaker AI's newest feature, Amazon SageMaker partner AI apps. As a result of this collaboration, AI developers utilizing Amazon SageMaker AI can now utilize Comet's comprehensive model assessment platform, featuring experiment tracking, evaluation of large language models (LLMs), and monitoring for production. The inclusion of Comet's tools will enhance the capabilities of Amazon SageMaker partner AI.

news.headline: XRP price surged 275% in 2024, hitting $2.86, becoming the third-largest crypto. Investors debating on buying the dip.
news.summary: The XRP Token (CRYPTO: XRP) from Ripple has surged by over 275% in 2024, hitting a new yearly peak of $2.86, prompting speculation among investors who are debating whether they overlooked the chance to purchase the digital currency before it reaches unprecedented levels. XRP has emerged as one of the most popular cryptocurrencies of late and now stands as the third-largest in terms of market capitalization, following behind Bitcoin and Ethereum. The surge in XRP can be attributed to the filing of XRP ETFs and expectations of a more crypto-friendly stance from the new White House administration, along with the potential resolutions of legal disputes faced by Ripple. Many observers anticipate further gains for XRP in the future. Following these developments, financial platform Benzinga surveyed its readers about their intentions to invest in XRP, aiming to gauge sentiments about potentially missed opportunities.

news.headline: Sun Life U.S. donates $50,000 to Northeastern University's Roux Institute in Maine to improve healthcare access.
news.summary: Sun Life U.S., based in Portland, Maine, has recently reaffirmed its commitment to supporting Northeastern University's Roux Institute Gap Year initiative by contributing a generous donation of $50,000. This contribution aligns with Sun Life U.S.'s dedication to assisting individuals in obtaining vital healthcare services and insurance coverage. The Roux Institute Gap Year program provides opportunities for individuals to engage in unique experiential learning experiences.

news.headline: ASCAP Experience returns in 2025 on Feb 27 at Skirball Cultural Center in LA with hit songwriters, industry leaders.
news.summary: A special one-day live event is set to take place in New York on December 5, 2024. This exclusive event, organized by ASCAP, the leading US Performing Rights Organization prioritizing creators, will feature discussions and live performances by successful songwriters, composers, and industry experts. ASCAP Experience aims to provide valuable insights and inspiration for attendees through engaging conversations and captivating musical performances.

news.headline: Express Wash Concepts opens two new Clean Express Auto Wash locations in Greater Cleveland at 1884 Nagle Rd. in Avon and 7796 Munson Rd. in Mentor. Strengthening their presence in the area.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, OH and CLEVELAND, December 5th, 2024 - Express Wash Concepts (EWC) revealed the ongoing expansion of Clean Express Auto Wash, unveiling two fresh Greater Cleveland sites. The locations are set at 1884 Nagle Rd. in Avon and 7796 Munson Rd. in Mentor. This move is part of EWC's strategy to widen its reach and offer convenient car wash services to more customers.

news.headline: Hazardous Tsunami waves are possible after a California quake - PTWC.
Global 3D printing materials market to grow by $8.14 billion from 2024-2028, driven by low waste in additive printing and AI market transformation.
news.summary: A recent report delving into the influence of AI on market dynamics reveals significant insights. The global market for 3D printing materials is projected to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 8.14 billion expected between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. This growth trajectory indicates a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 32.58% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Zephyr releases PSN Top Guns List for Q3 2024, highlighting best-in-class separate accounts, managed accounts, and managed ETF strategies. Easing monetary policies boost global markets.
news.summary: Global financial markets experienced a positive upturn due to the implementation of relaxed monetary policies. On December 5, 2024, Zephyr, a prominent asset and wealth management software company under Informa plc (LSE: INF), unveiled the much-awaited PSN Top Guns List for the third quarter of 2024. This list holds significant importance in the industry as it showcases leading performers.

news.headline: Intellezy named a Top Place to Work in Massachusetts for 2024 by The Boston Globe. #WOBURN #PRNewswire #Employers
news.summary: Intellezy, a learning solutions company in Woburn, Massachusetts, was recently recognized as one of the top employers in the state. The company offers a variety of cutting-edge learning services and has been acknowledged as one of the Top Places to Work in Massachusetts. This recognition highlights Intellezy's commitment to creating a positive work environment for its employees.

news.headline: SWAIA announces 2025 Native Fashion Week on May 7-11 in Santa Fe, NM. 2nd annual event.
news.summary: Santa Fe, New Mexico - The Southwestern Association for Indian Arts (SWAIA) has revealed that SWAIA Native Fashion Week (SNFW) will be making a comeback for its second year, taking place from May 7 to May 11, 2025. This event follows the triumph of the inaugural event held last year.

news.headline: OPEC+ postpones increase in oil production, causing market uncertainty.
AIFS recommends giving the gift of study abroad for college students this holiday season. - Stamford, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Stamford, Connecticut, it was suggested by the American Institute for Foreign Study (AIFS) that families looking for a special gift for their college-age relatives should think about offering a study abroad opportunity. AIFS, a cultural exchange and international education organization, encourages this as a valuable experience for young adults.

news.headline: NASA announces updates to Artemis campaign, planning to land next American astronauts and first international astronaut on Moon's South Pole.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, NASA revealed new details about its lunar exploration plans as part of the Artemis campaign. The agency disclosed its intention to land the next American astronauts along with the first international astronaut on the Moon's South Pole region. This mission signifies a significant milestone in space exploration. NASA experts shared the latest updates during the announcement, emphasizing the importance of this initiative. The decision to target the South Pole region underscores NASA's commitment to advancing lunar research and fostering international collaboration in space exploration.

news.headline: Scaramucci defends Bitcoin against skeptics, predicts $150,000 price, sees growth opportunities.
news.summary: SkyBridge Capital's founder and managing partner, Anthony Scaramucci, expressed optimism towards Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and its potential for further growth. Despite skepticism from traditional financial circles, Scaramucci reaffirmed his bullish stance on the cryptocurrency. In a recent post, he highlighted that the skepticism from finance elites indicated the ongoing opportunity for Bitcoin to rise. Scaramucci sees this as a sign of Bitcoin's potential growth, suggesting that traditional financiers may need to catch up or be left behind in the digital asset revolution. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: California Baptist University received over $102 million in donations in the past four years, supporting scholarships and academic programs.
news.summary: In the city of Riverside, California, a notable surge in donations has been witnessed by California Baptist University over the last four years. This increase has resulted in the accumulation of over $102 million in gifts and commitments. The university plans to utilize these contributions to enhance funding for scholarships, academic initiatives, and other programs.

news.headline: Asana named Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management. Recognized for 'Completeness of Vision' and 'Ability to Execute'. NYSE: ASAN, LTSE: ASAN.
news.summary: San Francisco-based Asana, Inc., a major enterprise work management platform, has been named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Collaborative Work Management for the second year in a row. The evaluation focused on its ‘Completeness of Vision’ and ‘Ability to Execute.’ Asana's recognition underscores its platform's effectiveness in providing clarity and improving collaboration. The company is listed on the NYSE as ASAN and the LTSE as ASAN.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating BCOV, ENLC, CCRN for possible securities law violations, impacting shareholders.
news.summary: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is currently examining several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. This includes Brightcove Inc. (NASDAQ: BCOV), which is under scrutiny for its sale. The investigation is focused on ensuring compliance and protection of shareholder interests. Further updates on this matter are expected as the investigation continues.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating EMKR, AMCR, MMLP, ALTM for securities law violations on behalf of shareholders.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, has initiated investigations into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties to shareholders. The companies under scrutiny include EMCORE Corporation (NASDAQ: EMKR) following its sale transaction. The investigation aims to analyze compliance with securities regulations and responsibilities to shareholders.

news.headline: Rewardian partners with Amazon Business to expand rewards catalog for employees, increasing choices for recognition.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Rewardian, a top player in the employee recognition and rewards sector, has revealed a key partnership with Amazon Business on December 5, 2024. Through this collaboration, Rewardian will broaden its catalog significantly by granting users direct entry to Amazon's extensive range of products.

news.headline: Rose Paving merges with Atlantic Southern Paving to expand, becoming one of the largest paving companies in the US.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development for the paving sector, Rose Paving (Rose) from Bridgeview, Illinois, has officially merged with Atlantic Southern Paving (ASP), forming a formidable alliance. This move establishes one of the largest self-performing paving entities in the United States, with an extensive combined reach. Known for their lasting partnerships, Rose and ASP now boast a nationwide network that is unmatched in its scope. The new venture combines their complementary geographical coverage to offer both national and regional paving services, setting a new standard in the industry.

news.headline: Hashed co-founder discusses memecoins and attention economy at India Blockchain Weeks, impacting their growth.
news.summary: During India Blockchain Weeks, Ryan Sungho Kim, co-founder of Hashed, discussed with Cointelegraph the impact of the attention economy on memecoins.

news.headline: Judge denies Boeing's guilty plea for 737 Max crashes; $487M fine and safety investments rejected due to victim families' opposition.
news.summary: Some families of the victims, however, objected to the agreement. It involved the aviation company paying a potential fine of $487 million and committing to implementing extra safety measures.

news.headline: US stocks stable, S&P 500 and Nasdaq up 0.1%, Dow down 0.3%. Airline stocks soar, AAL up 16%, UAL up 5%, DAL up 4.3%, JETS ETF up 4%.
news.summary: Trading on Wall Street was relatively quiet on Thursday as investors awaited confirmation of potential interest rate cuts in the November jobs report. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 inched up by 0.1%, reaching record highs, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 0.3%. The Russell 2000, consisting of small-cap stocks, declined by 0.8%. Notably, airline stocks saw significant growth, with American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ:AAL) surging by 16% after raising its quarterly growth forecast due to strong travel demand. United Airlines Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL) saw a 5% increase, and Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE:DAL) climbed 4.3%. The U.S. Global Jets ETF (NYSE:JETS), representing the broader sector, saw a 4% increase, hitting levels not seen since ...
